name: HURCO COMPANIES INC
summary: Hurco Companies, Inc. is an international industrial technology company that designs, manufactures, and sells computerized CNC machine tools—primarily vertical machining centers (mills) and turning centers (lathes)—to the metal cutting industry. Products include proprietary WinMax software-based control systems, automation integration equipment, press brake controls, and replacement parts. The company operates under the Hurco, Milltronics, and Takumi brands, with manufacturing in Taiwan, the U.S., and Italy, serving customers globally through subsidiaries in 12 countries.

products.name: Hurco VMi Product Line
products.description: Entry-level vertical machining centers with advanced WinMax control, available in six models with X-axis travels of 26–50 inches.

products.name: Hurco VMXi Product Line
products.description: Flagship high-performance vertical machining centers in 14 models with X-axis travels of 24–84 inches, for faster speeds and greater accuracy.

products.name: Hurco HSi Product Line
products.description: Vertical machining centers with motorized spindle up to 20,000rpm, targeting die and mold industry for surface finish and cycle time improvement.

products.name: Hurco Ui Series
products.description: Five-axis trunnion table machining centers on C-frame style machines, designed as an entry point into five-axis machining.

products.name: WinMax Software
products.description: Proprietary Windows-based conversational and graphical CNC programming software integrated into Hurco machine tool control systems.

products.name: UltiMotion
products.description: Patented motion control system providing cycle time reductions and improved surface finish quality, integrated into Hurco controls.

products.name: Milltronics CNC Machine Tools
products.description: Value-tier brand of CNC machine tools offering easy-to-use machines at competitive prices.

products.name: Takumi CNC Machine Tools
products.description: High-performance precision CNC machines for die and mold, aerospace, and medical industries, equipped with industry standard controls.

products.name: ProCobots Automation Solutions
products.description: Automation solutions including feeders, machine tending systems, and collaborative robots (cobots) for job shops.

products.name: LCM Precision Technology Components
products.description: High-value machine tool components, electro-mechanical components, and accessories produced by wholly-owned subsidiary LCM Precision Technology S.r.l.

products.name: Press Brake Computer Control Systems
products.description: Computer control systems and related software for press brake applications, sold as retrofit units for existing or new machines.
